body: Hey Amara, just wanted to loop back on our conversation from last week about the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal — I know you were still in diligence mode and I'm curious where your head is at given the timeline pressure. For context, [Breakthrough Energy Ventures](orgs/breakthrough-energy-ventures) is still sitting on the sidelines as of this week, so the syndicate slot we discussed is very much open if Halfway wants to move. I've been tracking this space closely and I think the window for a clean Series A at a reasonable valuation is narrowing fast with the regulatory tailwinds coming out of FERC next quarter. Also worth noting, [Clara Mendes](people/clara-mendes) is still CEO and fully committed to the vision — no succession drama to worry about, the team is locked in. Let me know if it makes sense to get on a call Thursday or Friday to work through the term sheet mechanics before the founder goes back into quiet mode.
